items.q: Name the capital city of Germany.
items.explanation: The capital of Germany is Berlin.

items.q: Tokyo is the capital of China.
items.explanation: This is standard world geography knowledge.

items.q: Name the capital city of India.
items.explanation: The capital of India is New Delhi.

items.q: Name the capital city of Indonesia.
items.explanation: The capital of Indonesia is Jakarta.

items.q: Abuja is the capital of Sweden.
items.explanation: This is standard world geography knowledge.

items.q: Name the capital city of Vietnam.
items.explanation: The capital of Vietnam is Hanoi.

items.q: What is the largest ocean on Earth?
items.explanation: It has the greatest surface area.

items.q: What is the capital of Portugal?
items.explanation: Lisbon is the capital of Portugal.

items.q: Name the capital city of Denmark.
items.explanation: The capital of Denmark is Copenhagen.

items.q: Name the capital city of Norway.
items.explanation: The capital of Norway is Oslo.
